title: 조동사 used to, would, would rather

stages.concept:
# Unit 058: 조동사 used to, would, would rather - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **used to, would, would rather**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **used to + 동사원형** — 과거에 ~하곤 했다 (지금은 안 함)

> I **used to** play the piano when I was young.
> 나는 어렸을 때 피아노를 치곤 했다. (지금은 안 침)

> She **used to** live in Busan.
> 그녀는 부산에 살곤 했다. (지금은 안 삼)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정**: didn't use to

> I **didn't use to** like vegetables.
> 나는 야채를 좋아하지 않았었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **would + 동사원형** — 과거에 ~하곤 했다 (반복적 동작)

> We **would** go fishing every summer.
> 우리는 매 여름 낚시를 하곤 했다.

**Q. 다음 중 올바른 문장을 고르세요.**
1. She would be thin. (과거 상태)
2. She used to be thin. ✅ (과거 상태)

🧑‍🎓 학생: would는 과거 반복 동작에만 쓰고, 과거 상태에는 used to만 쓸 수 있군요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! used to는 **과거의 상태/습관** 모두 가능하지만, would는 **과거의 반복적 동작**에만 써요.

> She **used to** be thin. (상태 — ✅)
> She **would** be thin. (상태 — ❌)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **would rather + 동사원형** — 차라리 ~하겠다

> I **would rather** stay home today.
> 나는 오늘 차라리 집에 있겠다.

> I **would rather** walk **than** take a bus.
> 나는 버스를 타느니 차라리 걸을래.

🧑‍🎓 학생: used to는 과거 습관/상태, would는 과거 반복 동작, would rather는 차라리 ~하겠다!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 058: 조동사 used to, would, would rather - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I used to (     ) my dog every morning.
> **정답** walk

---

**02.** She used to ? long hair.
> **정답** have

---

**03.** We would ? play in the park after school.
> **정답** (없음 - would 뒤에 동사원형)

---

**04.** He would rather ? at home.
> **정답** stay

---

**05.** They used to ? near the beach.
> **정답** live

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I used to played the piano.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** played → play

---

**07.** She use to eat a lot of chocolate.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** use → used

---

**08.** He would rather stays home.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** stays → stay

---

**09.** We used to goes to that restaurant.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes → go

---

**10.** I would rather to sleep than study.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to sleep → sleep

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 예전에 그 학교에 다녔었다.
I go to that school.
> **정답** used to

---

**12.** 그녀는 예전에 짧은 머리였다.
She have short hair.
> **정답** used to

---

**13.** 나는 차라리 집에서 쉬겠다.
I rest at home.
> **정답** would rather

---

**14.** 우리는 예전에 매주 산에 갔다.
We go to the mountain every week.
> **정답** used to (would)

---

**15.** 그는 차라리 걸어가겠다.
He walk.
> **정답** would rather

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 예전에 아침마다 조깅을 했었다.
used I to every morning jog
> **정답** I / used / to / jog / every / morning

---

**17.** 그녀는 예전에 시골에 살았었다.
used She in to the countryside live
> **정답** She / used / to / live / in / the / countryside

---

**18.** 나는 차라리 책을 읽겠다.
would I rather read a book
> **정답** I / would / rather / read / a / book

---

**19.** 우리는 예전에 매주 영화를 보곤 했다.
would We watch a movie every week
> **정답** We / would / watch / a / movie / every / week

---

**20.** 그는 차라리 혼자 있겠다.
would He rather alone be
> **정답** He / would / rather / be / alone
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 058: 조동사 used to, would, would rather - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
너는 택시를 타는니 버스를 타는 편이 더 났겠다.
You __________ take a bus than take a taxi.
used to
had better
would like to
would rather
> **정답** would rather

---

**02.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
그는 아침마다 조깅을 하곤 했다.
He goes jogging every morning.
He would go jogging every morning.
He would rather go jogging every morning.
He used to go jogging every morning.
> **정답** He used to go jogging every morning., He would go
jogging every morning.

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Sometimes she used to walking this road.
I didn't used to go to church on Sundays.
He didn't use to teach us English.
He would not get up early.
> **정답** I didn't used to go to church on Sundays.,
Sometimes she used to walking this road.

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
She used to drink coffee in the afternoon.
She __________ drink coffee in the afternoon.
would like to
had better
would
will
> **정답** would

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy would not rather drink soda.
Did Tom use to eat sandwiches for lunch?
Jake would rather study math.
They used to live in this house.
> **정답** Amy would not rather drink soda.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
They used to have lunch together.
will have
could have
be used to having
would have
> **정답** would have

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 요리를 하느니 차라리 설거지를 하겠다.
I would rather wash the dishes than cook.
I would rather cook than wash the dishes.
I had better wash the dishes than cook.
I had better cook than wash the dishes.
> **정답** I would rather wash the dishes than cook.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
He would go to the library every week.
could go
had better go
would rather go
used to go
> **정답** used to go

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy would do stretching before going to
bed.
Tom used to read newspapers every morning.
There would to be a theater near my house.
There would be a tree next the building.
> **정답** Tom used to read newspapers every morning.,
Amy would do stretching before going to bed.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이곳에 내가 가장 좋아하는 빵집이 있었다.
There is used to being my favorite bakery
here.
There used to my favorite bakery here.
There used to be my favorite bakery here.
There would be my favorite bakery here.
> **정답** There used to be my favorite bakery here.

---

**11.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
너는 쉬는 것보다 차라리 약을 먹는 것이 낫겠다.
You had rather take medicine than
rest.
> **정답** would, rather, than

---

**12.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
어릴 때 할머니가 맛있는 고구마를 주시곤 했다.
When I was young, my grandmother
was used to give me
delicious sweet potatoes.
> **정답** was, used to, give

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
You __________ write a report on a computer.
You __________ stay home than go there.
had better
would rather
would like to
would better
> **정답** would rather

---

**14.** 다음 주어진 문장과 뜻이 같은 문장을 고르시오.
He was a math teacher, but he isn't a math teacher
now.
He is a math teacher.
He could be a math teacher.
He used to be a math teacher.
He would be a math teacher.
> **정답** He used to be a math teacher.

---

**15.** 다음 대화에서 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
A: Do you know the way around here?
B: No, I live here when I was a kid. But I don't live now.
would rather live
would live
used to be live
used to live
> **정답** used to live

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
We would better have a meeting in the
morning.
She would to live next door to us when she
was young.
She would rather not work at home.
Did she use to get up early in the morning?
> **정답** Did she use to get up early in the morning?, She
would rather not work at home.

---

**17.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
I used to play under a tree
when I was a kid. The tree
would be next to my
house. But now the tree is not there. There is
a large building in that place.
> **정답** used to play, used to be, is

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I did not used to like
listening to classical music.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** used → use

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I would not rather give up
this exam.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** not rather → rather not

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Did she used to keep a
diary?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** used → use
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 058 조동사 used to, would, would rather중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** <보기> 조동사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
would rather, used to, had better
A: He teaches us math. Does he teach you?
B: No, he  (     )   (     )   (     )  us last year. But he
doesn't now.
정답 used, to, teach

---

**02.** <보기> 조동사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
would rather, used to, had better
A: I have a headache, I think I have a fever.
B: You  (     )   (     )   (     )  a rest at home than
play with us.
정답 would, rather, take

---

**03.** <보기> 조동사를 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
would rather, would, had better
A: Do you like going to see musicals?
B: I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  twice a
month last year. But I don't now.
정답 would, go, to, see, musicals

---

**04.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I  [used]  [to]  [visiting]  [my]
[grandparents]  [every]  [week.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 visiting → visit

---

**05.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I  [would]  [not]  [rather]  [go]  [camping]
[this]  [weekend.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 not rather → rather not

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Amy]  [would]  [live]  [next]  [door]
[when]  [she]  [was]  [young.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 would → used to

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 오늘 밖에 나가느니 차라리 집에 있겠어.
힌트 (     ) would rather, stay, go
I  (     )   (     )   (     )  home  (     )   (     )  out
today.
정답 would, rather, stay, than, go

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 함께 영화를 보러 가곤 했다. [go to the movies]
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  together.
정답 would, go, to, the, movies

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 시골에서 살 때 강아지를 키우곤 했다. [used,
have a puppy]
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  when she
lived in the country.
정답 used, to, have, a, puppy

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
I [be]  her best friend when I was a kid. She
[used, talk] (     )  to me on the phone before she
went to bed. We [would, talk] (     )  to each other a
lot. But now she [have gone] (     )  abroad to study. I
would, see (     )  her.
정답 was, used to talk, would talk, has gone, would like to
see

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 058: 조동사 used to, would, would rather - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
너는 걸어가느니 자전거를 타는 편이 더 났겠다.
You __________ ride a bike than walk. used to had better would like to would rather
> 정답: would rather

---

**02.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 저녁마다 산책을 하곤 했다.
She goes for a walk every evening.
She would go for a walk every evening.
She would rather go for a walk every evening.
She used to go for a walk every evening.
> 정답: She used to go for a walk every evening., She would go

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Sometimes she used to walking this path.
I didn't used to go to the park on Sundays.
He didn't use to teach us math.
He would not get up early.
> 정답: I didn't used to go to the park on Sundays.,

---

**04.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She used to drink tea in the morning.
She __________ drink tea in the morning. would like to had better would will
> 정답: would

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy would not rather drink juice.
Did Mina use to eat pizza for lunch?
Tom would rather study science.
They used to live in this town.
> 정답: Amy would not rather drink juice.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
They used to have breakfast together. will have could have be used to having would have
> 정답: would have

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 청소를 하느니 차라리 빨래를 하겠다.
I would rather do the laundry than clean.
I would rather clean than do the laundry.
I had better do the laundry than clean.
I had better clean than do the laundry.
> 정답: I would rather do the laundry than clean.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
He would go to the bookstore every month. could go had better go would rather go used to go
> 정답: used to go

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Mina would do stretching before going to bed.
Amy used to read books every evening.
There would to be a cafe near my house.
There would be a bench next to the building.
> 정답: Amy used to read books every evening.,

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이곳에 내가 가장 좋아하는 서점이 있었다.
There is used to being  my favorite bookstore here.
There used to my favorite bookstore here.
There used to be my favorite bookstore here.
There would be my favorite bookstore here.
> 정답: There used to be my favorite bookstore here.

---

**11.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
너는 기다리는 것보다 차라리 전화하는 것이 낫겠다.
You had rather call than wait.
> 정답: would, rather, than

---

**12.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
어릴 때 할아버지가 맛있는 떡을 주시곤 했다.
When I was young, my grandfather was used to give me delicious rice cakes.
> 정답: was, used to, give

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
You __________ read a book at home.
You __________ stay here than go there. had better would rather would like to would better
> 정답: would rather

---

**14.** 다음 주어진 문장과 뜻이 같은 문장을 고르시오.
He was a soccer player, but he isn't a soccer player now.
He is a soccer player.
He could be a soccer player.
He used to be a soccer player.
He would be a soccer player.
> 정답: He used to be a soccer player.

---

**15.** 다음 대화에서 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
A: Do you know the area around here?
B: No, I live here when I was a child.
But I don't live now. would rather live would live used to be live used to live
